overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character running through a post-apocalyptic urban environment with overgrown vegetation and abandoned vehicles. The character transitions from rocky wilderness to derelict city streets and narrow rocky corridors, with distant skyscrapers visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky wilderness with scattered trees and abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: running forward through rocky terrain toward distant urban structures

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation on the left side of the path
derelict white sedan partially buried in dirt on the left side
massive rock wall with overgrown moss on the right side of the path
tall modern skyscraper visible in the distance through the trees
green leafy trees scattered throughout the rocky landscape

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a wide-open rocky wilderness area with dirt ground and scattered trees. An abandoned white car sits on the left while large rock formations flank the path. A distant skyscraper is visible ahead, indicating the approach to an urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban residential street with derelict apartment buildings

events.description: exits rocky wilderness onto paved asphalt street with crosswalk markings
passes overturned abandoned pink car on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: running along abandoned city street past derelict apartment buildings and wrecked vehicles

entered.detail: multi-story derelict apartment building with broken windows and faded facade
cracked asphalt road surface with faded white lane markings
faded white zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt
abandoned pink sedan flipped on its side near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an abandoned urban street with asphalt pavement and crosswalk markings. The character runs past a derelict apartment building on the left, navigating around an overturned pink car. The environment is devoid of people, with only abandoned vehicles and crumbling architecture remaining.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky corridor with moss-covered walls leading to city center

events.description: turns right and enters narrow rocky passage between tall moss-covered walls

agents.ego_description: running through narrow overgrown corridor toward distant glass skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall rock wall covered in green moss and vegetation on the left side
tall rock wall covered in green moss and vines on the right side
narrow gravel and dirt path winding between the rock walls
tall modern glass and steel skyscraper visible at the end of the corridor
dense green foliage and vines growing on the rock surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed passage between moss-covered rock walls with dense overgrown vegetation. The ground changes to gravel as the corridor leads toward a prominent glass skyscraper visible in the distance. The lighting becomes more diffused with shadows cast by the tall rock walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a desolate rocky wilderness into the ruins of a derelict city and finally through a narrow natural corridor. It begins in a wide-open expanse of dirt and scattered trees, passing an abandoned white car and large rock formations while a distant skyscraper looms ahead. As the terrain shifts, the camera moves onto an asphalt urban street marked with crosswalks, navigating past a crumbling apartment building and an overturned pink car. The scene then transitions from the open city street into a narrow enclosed passage where the ground turns to gravel and moss-covered rock walls rise on either side. Finally, the environment becomes more shadowed and overgrown with dense vegetation as the camera pushes forward toward a prominent glass skyscraper in the distance.
